artifact_freshness.policy: The checklist artifact is current at generation time; the gate rejects artifacts marked stale, unknown, or regenerated without a source commit.

changed_files.targeted_cargo_skip_justification: Tracker-only hunk; Rust behavior is covered through the changed harness test row.
changed_files.unrelated_failure_note: Unrelated dirty harness/docs files and tmp.*.ec files remain unstaged; workspace fmt drift is reported by bd-bp8fl.7.3 and is not normalized away here.
changed_files.expected: Tracker close hunk is staged only with matching changed-surface validation evidence.
changed_files.actual: Checklist requires br graph proof, artifact regeneration, UBS coverage, and an unrelated-failure note.

targeted_cargo_commands: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenlibc-pearlforest-bd-bp8fl-7-4-test2 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test changed_surface_validation_checklist_test -- --nocapture

CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenlibc-pearlforest-bd-bp8fl-7-4-clippy2 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test changed_surface_validation_checklist_test -- -D warnings
changed_files.unrelated_failure_note: Focused harness test covers checklist schema, missing changed-file rows, missing targeted cargo gates, stale artifacts, skipped UBS without justification, and missing unrelated-failure notes.
changed_files.expected: Harness test changes have targeted cargo test/clippy proof and fail-closed mutations.
changed_files.actual: Checklist records the focused rch test/clippy commands and gate replay script.

next_safe_action: Before closing a bead, stage only owned files and confirm every staged changed file has targeted cargo proof or a justification, UBS proof or a justification, fixture/e2e replay, artifact regeneration, br graph health, and an unrelated-failure note.
